case_title: CARLOS CARO ET AL VS. CAROLINE OAKES

REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD BY MAIL SUBMITTED BY PLANTIFF

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-05-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-05-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF CARLOS CARO IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF YUN WU IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT CAROLINE OAKES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHERDIAN OAKES IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARO, CARLOS WU, YUN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OAKES, CAROLINE OAKES, SHERIDAN $7,025.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,025.00, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
